---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose new functionality or an enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem are you facing today? Describe the context — who is affected,
     how often, and what the impact is. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can:
     API shape, configuration options, expected output. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why didn't they work for you? -->

## Willingness to Implement

<!-- Are you willing to open a PR for this?
     Options: Yes / Yes, with guidance / No -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, links to prior art, etc. -->
